summary.key_theme: Viavi Solutions 受益於 AI 驅動的網路安全與感測技術需求成長，股價表現強勁並創下多年新高。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Hits 24-Year High on ‘Buy’ Reco
bullish.reason: 股價觸及 24 年來新高，反映市場對其買入評級的強烈認可，顯示投資人對公司未來成長潛力信心十足。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on Viavi Solutions: “I Know It’s Expensive, But I’ll Tell You, That Is the Hot Area”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 指出儘管估值偏高，但該公司處於熱門產業領域，為股價提供正面輿論支持。

bullish.title: How Investors May Respond To Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Expanding AI-Driven Network Security And Sensing Portfolio
bullish.reason: 公司擴展 AI 驅動的網路安全與感測產品組合，直接提升了其在關鍵技術領域的競爭優勢與長期營收前景。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 總結了近期股價上漲的驅動因素，確認了市場對該公司基本面改善的正面情緒。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions, Powell, Sterling, Energy Recovery, and Blink Charging Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
bullish.reason: 報導指出 VIAV 與其他個股同步上漲，顯示市場整體資金流向對該公司有利。

bearish.title: D.R. Horton, Viavi Solutions, and ATI Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 報導提及股價短期回調，屬於市場正常波動，未見重大負面基本面消息。

neutral.title: Stocks making big moves this week: Shopify, Winnebago, Coinbase, STAAR Surgical, and Viavi Solutions
neutral.reason: 僅將 VIAV 列入本週波動較大個股清單，未提供具體多空方向分析，屬中性市場觀察。

neutral.title: Q4 Rundown: Viavi Solutions (NASDAQ:VIAV) Vs Other Inspection Instruments Stocks
neutral.reason: 針對第四季財報進行同業比較，提供客觀數據分析，無明顯偏向多空之評論。
